package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerStringHandlingStringsJoinSingleElementLoop() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_string_handling_strings_join_single_element_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: String handling. Flag repeated strings.Join calls in loops where one builder outside the loop would do."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
